commands.name: context-check
commands.details: Validates context file references and reports uncommitted files missing from every context so the agent runs context_sync.

commands.name: ts-check
commands.details: Runs Tau schema drift check, Oxfmt formatting, Oxlint lint fixes, TypeScript (tsgo) checks, unit tests, and Fallow dead-code/duplication checks.

commands.name: md-check
commands.details: Runs Markdown linting and fixes through markdownlint-cli2.
